codeReview.summary: The feature moves supplier lifecycle enforcement into the Supplier domain and consistently applies it across purchase-order creation, goods receipt, purchase invoice posting, supplier payments, and supplier settlements while keeping suppliers visible for reference. The diff also shows payable-account provisioning is returned atomically during supplier creation and adds invariant/runtime regression coverage that exercises pending and suspended supplier behavior end to end.

summary: Pass. Supplier onboarding now provisions payable truth atomically and non-active suppliers remain reference-visible while transactional P2P and AP actions fail closed with explicit lifecycle reasons.
